user.title: ZoneFlow
user.description: General settings. The weekly average temperature is read from the chosen weather entity. Zones are added after install via the "Configure" button.

data.action: What do you want to do?

add_zone.title: Add zone
add_zone.description: A default section "Whole zone" is created; you can split it later.

data.action: What do you want to do?
What do you want to do?

group_basic.title: Group (zone {zone})
group_basic.description: Pick the valves that turn on TOGETHER in this group.

group_rates.title: Group "{group}" catch-cup values (mm / test)
group_rates.description: How many mm the group (all its valves on) applies to each section during the catch-cup test. 0 if it doesn't reach there.

run_now.name: Water now
run_now.description: Immediately start a watering cycle with the currently computed durations.

stop.name: Stop watering
stop.description: Stop the running cycle and close all valves.
